creator: _jkrow
caption:
Staying in a local bed & breakfast in Penn Yan is one of the best ways to experience the Finger Lakes in Upstate New York…

…and so many people don’t know about it!

[save this for travel planning]

I recently visited all of these B&Bs in partnership with @fingerlakescountrysides

Think cozy living rooms where conversations actually happen (sans cell phone), homemade breakfasts made fresh every morning, and hosts who double as a built in concierge with recommendations you won’t find on Google

If you love slow travel, connection, gorgeous historic houses and feeling right at home (+ great wine!), this is the trip for you 👇 

🏠 WHERE TO STAY: 
• The Laurentide Inn (@thelaurentide): Historic stay with an on site restaurant and brewery, walking distance to cute downtown shops & eateries!

• Trimmer House Bed & Breakfast: A beautifully restored 1890s home with original detail (you’ll feel like you’re stepping back in time)

• Aubergine (@aubergine311): Intimate, European-inspired rooms and spot on wine recommendations!

• Los Gatos B&B: Solar powered cabins and rooms, homemade jams and farm-to-table breakfast 

🍷 While you’re in the area, don’t miss wine tasting at Keuka Spring Vineyards! They just renovated their tasting room and it is SO BEAUTIFUL. 

And if you’re short on time or just don’t want to bounce between vineyards, @oncefingerlakes has a regional tasting room where you can taste all the best wines in the Finger Lakes region in one place.

👉 Say ‘PENNYAN’ and I’ll send you all these links for where to stay and where to eat!

#pennyan #flxcountrysides #travelguide #upstateny

transcription.text: I wish someone had told me sooner that Panyan is one of the best places to stay in the Finger Lakes, especially if you're visiting Kuka Lake wineries, and when you stay in a bed and breakfast here, your stay becomes part of the experience. You'll sleep in beautiful historic homes, some close enough to walk Main Street, and just minutes from the best vineyards in the Finger Lakes, so you're not rushing or driving around all day. You come back from wine tasting to places where people actually sit down in the living room, talk, and share stories over tea, where breakfast is homemade, and where hosts know the area and each other and help you decide where to go next. Staying in a Panyan B&B is a slower, more personal, more local way to travel that feels relaxed, intentional, and a little bit different. These are the kinds of places where you show up as strangers and leave as friends. I listed my top B&B picks for Panyan in the caption.
